( # w ) MHm, 1998 w r ^ I 3. iRT TfcpT (^3% STFTlf^T^ ^ ^ - f a ^ K H %?£y$m) fafl-qH, 1979 % f ¥ W T 4 - " % ^ R ^ % ' , teffi"tf ^ T " [ "4. -f^FPr/I [l/I V/149/98 ] •HK fe^l"! : ^J?^ fafWT 14 ^'repSR, 1979 ^ t 3#Rjf%cf 1%% MI 3385 GI/98 0 ) -- 1 of 2 -- W«8* T*® GAZEm, OF INDIA ; ©TTRAORDINARY -ART III—SEC. 41 PRESS COUNCIL OF INDIA ' ' w % NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 10th November, 1998 KNo. 17/9/98-99-PCI.—In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (a) of Section-26 of the Press Conned Act, 1978 (37 of 1978), the Press Council of India hereby makes the following amendment to the Press Council (Procedure for Conduct of Meetings & Business) Regulations. 1979 : n 1. These Regulations may be called the Press Council (Procedure for Conduct of Meetings & Business) (Amend- ment) Regulations, 1998. 2. They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 3. In the Press Council (Procedure for Conduct of Meetings & Business) Regulation 1979, in the proviso to Regula- tion 4-"Quorum at Meetings", the following proviso shall be substituted :— "Provided that where there is no quorum, the meeting maybe adjourned for an hour to allow time for assembly, so, however, that no quorum shall be necessary in respect of the meeting adjourned for lack of quorum". PREM KUMAR, Secy. [No. Advt./III/IV/149/98J Foot Note : The Principal Regulations were notified on November 14, 1979.
